title: RiPP post-translational modification diversity and discovery

ripp_challenge.issue: Difficulty in direct application of genome mining to RiPP discovery
ripp_challenge.cause: Lack of ubiquitous features across RiPP biosynthetic pathways
ripp_challenge.limitation: Low accuracy in precursor peptide prediction

ripp_classes.characteristics: Founding members discovered for each class through various methods

genome_mining_application.challenge: RiPPs remain difficult to discover via genome mining alone
genome_mining_application.opportunity: Many uncharacterized RiPPs with unknown PTMs
genome_mining_application.potential: Promiscuous enzyme activity presents discovery opportunities
